channel.title: "Oaks" on DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments
channel.description: Recent content in "Oaks" on DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments

item.title: Interspecific variation in leaf functional and defensive traits in oak species and its underlying climatic drivers
item.description: Abstract Plants exhibit a diverse set of functional traits and ecological strategies which reflect an adaptation process to the biotic and abiotic components of the environment.
